strengths: Built production ELT with Airflow and dbt
weaknesses: No explicit web scraping frameworks listed
Limited explicit years in dedicated data engineering role
No direct mention of Cloud Composer/Pub/Sub/Cloud Run
improvement_bullets: Engineered Python-based web scraping modules using Beautiful Soup and Scrapy to aggregate external market data, integrating results into cloud-based data pipelines for research initiatives.
Managed GCP infrastructure including CloudSQL and Cloud Storage, implementing automated data masking and anonymization protocols to ensure PII compliance for sensitive datasets.
Deployed containerized services on Cloud Run and utilized Pub/Sub for event-driven architecture, optimizing real-time data ingestion workflows.
Orchestrated complex data workflows using Cloud Composer, transitioning existing Airflow processes to a fully managed GCP environment to improve pipeline reliability.
Developed robust data processing scripts to perform automated anonymization and masking of sensitive user identifiers, upholding data privacy standards during transformation.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Engineer, Web Scraping opportunity with 10a Labs. I am interested in this opportunity because 10a Labs stands at the critical intersection of AI security and data intelligence, providing the essential infrastructure to protect frontier AI systems. What interests me about working for 10a Labs is its unique role as a safety layer for top-tier AI labs; the challenge of building reliable data pipelines to stay ahead of evolving threats deeply intrigues me. I believe my expertise in building production-grade ETL pipelines and my proficiency in Python-based data collection would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing scalability and data integrity. In fact, while building the FRED Economic Batch Pipeline, I designed an end-to-end ELT system using Python, Airflow, and dbt to ingest complex API data into BigQuery. By implementing automated data quality validation with Great Expectations and CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions, I reduced analyst query time and ensured the delivery of reliable, high-quality data. Ultimately, I know that the Data Engineer, Web Scraping role at 10a Labs would allow me to bring my pipeline design skills to the development of your intelligence-gathering infrastructure. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my data transformation and API integration skills. I collaborated with stakeholders to extract and clean data from REST APIs, which directly supported front-end feature development and improved data accuracy across systems by 60%. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my web scraping and cloud infrastructure experience in working on critical data collection at 10a Labs. I know that my technical proficiency in GCP and my commitment to secure data practices align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Engineer, Web Scraping role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
